full_text:
Hu Cai 胡才
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hu Cai (胡才)was born in Xihe?. Bandit leader who helped the escaping Emperor Xian. Hu Cai was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Hu Cai lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
